title: Documentation: README and Setup Guide
description: Write comprehensive README with: project overview, features, screenshots, build instructions, development setup, architecture overview. Include CONTRIBUTING guide for future contributors.
agent_output:
Created comprehensive documentation for the Rick Terminal project:

1. **README.md** - Complete project overview with:
   - Feature overview and badges
   - ASCII screenshot mockup showing three-column layout
   - Theme color reference table
   - Installation and build instructions
   - Usage guide with keyboard shortcuts
   - Architecture overview with project structure
   - Links to all existing ADRs
   - Development and testing instructions
   - Security summary
   - Links to CONTRIBUTING.md

2. **CONTRIBUTING.md** - Contributor guidelines covering:
   - Development setup and prerequisites
   - Swift and SwiftUI code style conventions
   - Architecture guidelines and ADR process
   - Pull request requirements and process
   - Testing requirements with examples
   - Documentation standards

3. **docs/ARCHITECTURE.md** - Technical architecture document with:
   - System diagram showing component relationships
   - Detailed descriptions of all core components
   - Data flow patterns (Combine, thread safety, environment injection)
   - Complete file organization reference
   - Extension points for future development
   - Performance and security considerations
